---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

**Why?**
What problem does this solve or what workflow does it enable?

**Which module would this belong to?**
(e.g., core, android, system, github, new module)

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've tried or other approaches.
